001/**
002 * Enumerates the command words recognized by the game.
003 * <p>
004 * Each constant corresponds to a user command verb (for example {@code go} or
005 * {@code help}). {@link #UNKNOWN} represents an unrecognized command word.
006 * </p>
007 *
008 * @author Barnabe Jouanard
009 * @version 2026.04.19
010 */
011public enum CommandWord {
012    /** Moves the player to an adjacent room. */
013    go,
014    /** Prints help text and the list of available commands. */
015    help,
016    /** Quits the game. */
017    quit,
018    /** Reprints the current room description. */
019    look,
020    /** Exchanges certain items for money. */
021    cashin,
022    /** Returns to the previous room, when possible. */
023    back,
024    /** Runs commands from a packaged test file. */
025    test,
026    /** Changes the player's displayed name. */
027    name,
028    /** Takes an item from the current room. */
029    take,
030    /** Drops an item from the player's inventory into the room. */
031    drop,
032    /** Prints the player's inventory. */
033    inventory,
034    /** Fallback value used when the command word is not recognized. */
035    UNKNOWN;
036}
